creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
On May 25, 2013, at 21:00, Dimitry Andric <dim@freebsd.org> wrote:
> On May 25, 2013, at 20:44, "O. Hartmann" <ohartman@zedat.fu-berlin.de> =
wrote:
>> On Sat, 2013-05-25 at 20:17 +0200, Dimitry Andric wrote:
>>> This looks like <http://llvm.org/bugs/show_bug.cgi?id=3D16139>, a =
bug in
>>> the vectorizer (which is enabled by default at -O3).
> ...
>> With the patch applied, x11-drivers/xf86-video-intel builds, but I =
can
>> not say whether it works, since I have no X11 on an Intel iGPU.
>>=20
>> Thanks, the issue should be closed due to my -O3 compiling. Or marked
>> fixed with the provided patch?
>=20
> I will import the fix for clang from upstream.  I also think it will =
go
> into the 3.3 branch, but better to fix the issue now, before too many
> people encounter it...

I imported the fix into head in r250997.  I will MFC it after 3 days.
